title: Secret Garden
description: When Cyborg starts to rage out, Starfire takes him to her secret garden in the backyard to relax.

title: Them Jaws
description: The Titans' day at the beach is interrupted by something vicious in the ocean.

title: Hero Hotline
description: When Cyborg and Starfire need appliance repair help, they call the Hero Hotline, a unique trio of superheroes.

title: Lake Side Story
description: While at the lake, Robin falls in love with a female fish and must choose between her and the Titans.

title: Beast Boy's St. Patrick's Day Luck, and It's Bad
description: The Titans (except Beast Boy) are cursed on St. Patrick's Day and must travel to the end of the rainbow for the cure.

title: Two Parter Part 1
description: The Titans visit the Hall of Justice to use the pool, but then decide to check out the inside.

title: Two Parter Part 2
description: The Titans must save the members of the Justice League from the clutches of the supervillain Darkseid.

title: Select Your Trek
description: Raven, Cyborg and Robin are zapped into a book and must rely on Beast Boy and Starfire to make the right selections to get out.

title: Helmet of Doom
description: The Titans get stuck in the swamp and learn the truth about the Hall of Doom.

title: Ruler's Rule
description: Robin teaches the Titans how to use a ruler.

title: Finally a Lesson
description: Robin finally teaches the other Titans a very valuable lesson.

title: Moonlighting
description: Inspired by a commercial, the Titans visit Dr. Light and Dr. Moon to learn how to make extra money.

title: Activate
description: The Wonder Twins teach the Titans about water conservation.

title: White Elephant
description: The Titans are forced to play a game of White Elephant to save their Christmas presents.

title: Bottle Episode
description: When the Titans get trapped in a giant bottle in their living room, they pass the time by reminiscing.

title: O.S.H.A.
description: The Titans must clean the Tower for a surprise inspection.

title: Ice Cold
description: Cyborg and Beast Boy disguise themselves as ice villains at the Cold Academy in order to help Captain Cold.

title: Closed Circuit
description: Robin installs two security cameras to catch the thief who keeps stealing his overnight oats.

title: DC Leader Swap
description: Robin and The Joker swap roles and lead each other's teams.

title: Elseworlds
description: When the Titans are banished to Elseworlds, they try to find a way back to the main DC timeline.

title: Crime Alert
description: Robin is ready to answer a crime alert but the other Titans are in no rush.

title: Garage Sale
description: Robin makes the other Titans sell their treasured mementos from past episodes.

title: How 'Bout Some Effort
description: It's Valentine's Day and Cyborg goes to great lengths to make it special for his girlfriend Jinx.

title: Torso Soap
description: The League of Legs returns to help stop crime and learn about the importance of leg washing.

title: Bro, Where's the Batmobile?
description: After a fun night out, Birdarang and Batarang must retrace their steps to find the Batmobile.

title: Mani - Pedi
description: After defeating Brother Blood, the Titans reward themselves with a trip to the nail salon.

title: Freak Show
description: Control Freak tries once more to convince the Titans that the original show is the superior series.

title: Use It or Lose It
description: The Monitor tries to make the Titans use their powers properly instead of the silly ways they've been used in the past.

title: DC Comic Book Club
description: Robin hosts a DC Comics book club but the other Titans may not have done the assigned reading.

title: Arms Race with Legs
description: When her teammates turns evil, it's up to Lady Legasus to stop the League of Legs.

title: Megalodon Jackson
description: The Titans face-off against a giant shark but soon discover that things are not what they seem.

title: The True Meaning of Christmas
description: Fed up with never getting presents from Santa, the Titans head to the north pole to take themselves off the Naughty List by any means necessary.

title: Favorite Animated Show Nominee
description: Robin finds it suspicious that the Titans are always nominated for an award but never win and is determined to find out why.

title: Unmasking - The Teen Titans Story
description: A behind the scenes look at the history of Teen Titans Go!

title: Obinray
description: The Titans start speaking Pig Latin to prevent Robin from eavesdropping.

title: Philly
description: While visiting Philadelphia, the Titans join forces with the Bacon Brothes to stop William Penn's rampage on the city.

title: The Cruel Giggling Ghoul
description: The Titans go to an amusement park to see LeBron James but instead help solve a mystery.

title: Squash & Stretch
description: The Titans learn about cartoon-style violence in order to get revenge on a snack-stealing squirrel.

title: Teen? Titans
description: When the Titans' real ages are revealed they must think and act like teenages to remain Teen Titans.

title: Cake!
description: Cyborg's birthday wish goes wrong and everything becomes cake.

title: The Teen Titans Go Easter Holiday Classic
description: The Easter Bunny is missing, and it's up to the Titans to find him before Easter is ruined.

title: Not a Halloween Special
description: The Titans decide to not produce a Halloween special this year but soon discover they may not have a choice.

title: High Five
description: While shopping at the mall, the Titans enter a contest to win a hot tub.

title: Pool Shark
description: The Titans encourage King Shark to start playing pool again but he must first learn how to trust his gut.

title: Stickiest Situation
description: Sticky Joe loses his shoe and his search takes him on another wild adventure.

title: Shark Tank
description: King Shark wears a tank top and teaches the Titans all about the "tank life."

title: Chowda
description: The Titans are in Boston, and with the help of Deadman, search for a legendary bowl of clam chowder.

title: Winged Warriors
description: After they receive a distress call, Robin, Raven, and Birdarang rush off to help the Winged Warriors, a society dedicated to birds.

title: Task Force X
description: Tired of fighting low tier villains, the Titans seek out Amanda Waller so they can join Task Force X.

title: Best Mom Ever
description: It's Mother's Day and the Titans compete to determine which of them is the best mom and deserves all the gifts.

title: Passive Income
description: Lex Luthor buys the Titans' island and shows them how to make passive income through real estate.

title: Diner Means Breakfast
description: Cyborg and Beast Boy realize that what they order to eat at a diner might have much bigger consequences.

title: Teen Titans and the Easter Factory
description: Will a trip to the Eastory Factory be a magical time for the Titans or is it another one of the Easter Bunny's tricks?

title: Shhh
description: The Titans discover a sleeping gorilla in their kitchen and must silently return it to the zoo.
